description_long: This is a modern, expansive single-family house surrounded by a perimeter wall and lush landscaping, including numerous trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof design with multiple levels and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior combines light-colored stone, wood, and glass, giving it a contemporary and elegant appearance. There is a spacious driveway leading to a covered garage, as well as several outdoor living spaces, including patios and terraces. The house is set within a well-defined lot, with a mix of paved and green areas, and the main entrance is accentuated by a prominent gate and pathway. The overall layout is open and airy, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, stone and wood accents, surrounded by trees and a perimeter wall, featuring a driveway, garage, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, prominent gate, driveway, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large patio, expansive glass windows, and the garage area with driveway access.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, multiple windows, and the integration of outdoor spaces with greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional patios, terraces, and the continuation of the perimeter wall and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a paved pathway, flanked by landscaping and a secure gate, with no porch or columns.
